records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8928
In the records for Vijayendra's lineage, which legal title is 
associated with the household of Radharaman Datta?
Chief Justice of the High Court.
8929
Which lineage is documented starting in Section 180 of the text?
Roharh Sodarpur.
8930
Who is the father of Lal, Madhav, and Shyamram in the Roharh 
section?
Pashupati.
8931
Identify the father of the offspring Durgadatta, Uma, and Ram in 
the Roharh lineage.
Mishra Harangi.
8932
In the Roharh section, who is the son of Durgadatta?
Madhusudan Shivanandan.
8933
Which village's genealogical records begin in Section 186?
Kodariya.
8934
Who is the father of the children Mahesh and Parameshwaridatta in 
the Kodariya records?
Diwan Bhavanidatta.
8935
In the Kodariya lineage, who is the son of Mukundalal?
Damodar Keshavo.
8936
Which section introduces the genealogical records for Sakuri Palli?
Section 190.
8937
Who are the four offspring of Sadashiv mentioned at the start of the 
Sakuri section?
Manganu, Karu, Bhora, and Hari.
8938
In the Sakuri records, who is the son of Bhavanand?
Bhuvan Pradumn.
8939
Which prominent scholarly title is given to Krishnadatta, the son of 
Pradumna, in the Sakuri lineage?
Mahamahopadhyaya (M.M.).
8940
Who is the father of Suvansa, Aniruddha, and Jayakanta in the 
Sakuri records?
Shambhudatta.
8941
In the lineage of Shambhudatta, which son is also known by the 
title 'Hingu Mahanthi'?
Shambhudatta himself.
8942
Section 193 documents the genealogy of which specific Pali?
Phuldaha.
8943
Who are the four sons of Nagin mentioned in the Phuldaha Pali 
records?
Mahesh, Harikesh, Ganesha, and Kashinath.
8944
In the Phuldaha lineage, who is the father of the son named 
Gangadhar?
Mahesh.
8945
Which section of the text is dedicated to the Parhi Palli lineage?
Section 196.
8946
Who are the children of Nahiya listed in the Parhi records?
Goshai Jayshiv, Beniram, Kotishwar, Manbodh, and Raghav.
8947
In the Parhi lineage, which professional title is held by Kotishwar's 
son, Bacha?
Vaiyakarana (Vaiya.), meaning Grammarian.
8948
Identify the father of the offspring Hemkar, Bachran, and Purna in 
Section 198.
Shulapani.
8949
The records for Haripur Pali mention 'Goni' as the son of which 
individual?
Bachran.
8950
Who is the father of Vasudev in the Haripur Pali lineage?
Bauku.
8951
In the context of the Haripur records, who are the children of 
Savurdutta?
Musahad and a daughter married into the Panichobh lineage.
8952
In the lineage of Bhavanidatta (Section 200), who is the son of 
Rajamani?
Nahbharan.
8953
Which Pali's genealogical records begin in Section 203?
Samaya.
8954
Who is the son of Ganganand in the Samaya Pali lineage?
Gunanand Nahranand.
8955
Section 204 provides the lineage for which specific village?
Jamdauli.
8956
Who are the two sons of Harihar mentioned in the Jamdauli records? Khadgapani and Jayakrishna.
8957
In the Jamdauli lineage, who are the sons of Khadgapani?
Ratnapani and Padmapani.
8958
Which professional designation is associated with Jyotishi Bibuajik 
in Section 174?
Astrologer (Jyotishi).
8959
In the Nagaram records, who is the son of Dullah?
Nagardharik.
8960
The abbreviation 'Pr.' (à¤ªà¥ à¤°.) in the Panji records usually stands 
for which title?
Pramukha, meaning prominent or chief.
8961
Who is the father of Bubuajik in the Nagaram lineage?
Mitra Nath.
8962
In the Roharh lineage, identify the father of Santoshmani.
Navma.
8963
According to the Roharh records, who is the son of Harigovind?
Pitambar.
8964
In the Sakuri records, identify the father of Devi Kant and Lakshmi 
Kant.
Suvansa.
8965
Which son of Diwan Bhavanidatta in the Kodariya lineage is 
associated with the 'Khouar' village?
Parameshwaridatta.
8966
In the Phuldaha records, who is the father of the daughter (or child) 
named Neena?
Bhikari.
8967
Who is the father of Raghavchandra in the Kodariya lineage?
Moti Baccha.
8968
In the Parhi lineage, who is the father of Vaiya. Chandradatta?
Veniram.
8969
Identify the offspring of Vaiya. Mullani in the Parhi records.
Sodarpur and Satlakha connections.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8970
Who is the son of Shulapani's child, Bachran, in the Haripur 
records?
Goni.
8971
In the Haripur lineage, who are the three offspring of Hemkar?
Bachran, Purna, and an unnamed daughter.
8972
Which clan or village origin is consistently abbreviated as 'B.' 
followed by numbers in the text?
It refers to specific reference numbers within the Panji register 
books (e.g., B 57/1).
8973
In the context of the Panji, what does the word 'Dau' (à¤¦à¥Œ) or 
'Ddou' (à¤¦à¥à¤¦à¥Œ) indicate?
It indicates a marriage linkage or an entry from a particular 
village/source.
8974
Who is the father of Jagadish and Satish Narayan in the Roharh 
records?
Choudhary Nandankishore.
8975
In the Nagaram lineage, who is the father of the sons Mitranath and 
Yoganath?
Nagardhari.
8976
According to Section 180, what is the 'Gram' (village) associated 
with the Roharh lineage?
Sodarpur.
8977
In the Sakuri records, Bhavanand's son Krishnadatta holds the title 
of _____.
Mahamahopadhyaya.
8978
Who is recorded as the son of Ratnapani in the Jamdauli lineage?
Jagatbandhu.
8979
In the context of the Maithil Panji Prabandh, what does the term 
'suto' (à¤¸à¥à¤¤à¥‹) signify?
It signifies 'son of'.
8980
What is the meaning of the term 'suta' (à¤¸à¥ à¤¤à¤¾) when 
recording lineages in the provided source material?
It refers to 'daughter of'.
8981
The ancestral village or clan of origin for a Maithil Brahmin family 
is traditionally called a _____.
Mool
8982
In the Nagram branch records (section 3.61), who is identified as 
the son of Jagadbandhu?
Horari.
8983
Identify the son of Jivanath who is listed alongside Horari in the 
lineage of Jagadbandhu.
Manankrishna.
8984
In the record of Horari's daughter, who was the son of Dukhmanyan 
from the Khandwala Mool?
Barah.
8985
According to the text, the son of Panchanu named Bachnu 
originated from which village?
Pali.
8986
Who was the son of Manahdatt from the Sodarpur origin as 
mentioned in section 3.61?
Apara.
8987
From which village did Kaladhar, the son of Dharmeshwar, 
originate?
Mander.
8988
Identify the sons of Jiva listed in the lineage of section 3.61.
Gopal, Babunath, and Shyamnath.
8989
To which individual from the Baliyas Mool was the daughter of 
Horari given in marriage?
Jivanath.
8990
Shambhunath, the son of Biku, belongs to which ancestral origin 
(Mool)?
Pandua.
8991
Who is recorded as the son of Shyamnath in the genealogical 
section 3.61?
Kishorik.
8992
Totak is identified as the son of which individual?
Padmapani.
8993
The daughter of Tota was given in marriage to Bhavi, who was the 
son of whom?
Purandar from the Baliyas origin.
8994
Name the three children of Tota mentioned in the lineage record.
Mahapurush, Kanakman, and Babueka.
8995
Nagardhar is listed as the son of which person from the Khaual 
origin?
Jayakrishna.
8996
Bachanuk is identified as the son of which genealogical figure?
Nagardhar.
8997
In the record of Manbodh (section 205), who is the son of 
Harikrishna from the Baliyas Mool?
Shatrujit.
8998
Manbodh's daughter was given in marriage to Saheb, the son of 
whom?
Sadashiv from the Sarisab origin.
8999
List the six children of Bhayan mentioned in the section 205 record. Babuni, Rami, Amritnath, Budhman, Mathuranath, and Gopinath.
9000
Govinda is recorded as the son of which individual?
Babuni.
9001
Who is the father of Bhuvanandan as mentioned in the marital 
record of Govinda's daughter?
Umapati from the Sodarpur origin.
9002
Chetranath is the son of which figure in the Manbodh lineage?
Rami.
9003
Parashman and Ruviru are identified as the sons of whom?
Chetranath.
9004
Tirthaman is recorded as the son of which person?
Parashman.
9005
Who were the two sons of Tirthaman mentioned in the genealogy?
Balbhadra and Dayanath.
9006
Amarnath and Durganath are listed as the sons of which individual? Balbhadra.
9007
Dayanath's daughter was given to Revatinath, the son of whom?
Krishnavat from the Mander origin.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
9008
Babulal is identified as the son of which person in the Manbodh 
branch?
Kulman.
9009
Identify the son of Dhanay from the Sodarpur origin associated 
with Bhaiyoka.
Chanan.
9010
Who is the son of Nandishwar from the Pandua Mool mentioned in 
the daughter's record of Apara?
Mansukh.
9011
Jagannath and Dwarikanath are recorded as the sons of whom?
Bhaiyo.
9012
In section 206, the daughter of Mathuranath was given in marriage 
to the son of whom?
Paan Mansukh from the Pandua origin.
9013
Who were the sons of Tejnath mentioned in the lineage of section 
206?
Ganesh and Mahesh.
9014
Mahesh's daughter was given in marriage to Bechu, the son of 
whom?
Ram from the Sodarpur Mool.
9015
Who is the son of Paan Gopal (Gopinath) recorded in the text?
Ritunath.
9016
Ritunath's sons are identified as Kumar and _____.
Aniruddha
9017
In section 207, who is the father of the son-in-law Shatrujit in 
Aniruddha's record?
Tulsidatt from the Jijilwal Mool.
9018
Nena (Nagardhari) is recorded as the son of which person?
Patiram.
9019
Shivadatt is identified as the son of which individual?
Vadan.
9020
Bacharu and Manbodh are the sons of which genealogical figure?
Parashuram.
9021
Who is recorded as the son of Bacharu in section 207?
Poshan.
9022
Chhotku and Bhagwandatt are the sons of whom?
Poshan.
9023
Sundar is identified as the son of which person?
Chhotku.
9024
Dashrath is the son of which individual in the Khaual origin line?
Sundar.
9025
In section 208, who is identified as the son of Saule?
Lakshmikant.
9026
Hemangad and Bacharu are recorded as the sons of which figure?
Lakshmikant.
9027
Dharmeshwar is identified as the son of which person?
Hemangad.
9028
Ummadatt is the son of which individual from the Baliyas origin?
Bacharu.
9029
Who were the children of Ummadatt as listed in section 208?
Kamladatt, Chenga (Gauridatt), and Shambhudatt.
9030
Jaleshwar is identified as the son of which figure?
Kamladatt.
9031
Who were the three sons of Devidatt mentioned in the record?
Yashodhar, Shridhar, and Umesh.
9032
Vanshiddhar is the son of which person in the Mander Mool line?
Yashodhar.
9033
Harinandan is the son of which individual as stated in the record of 
Kapileshwar?
Kapileshwar.
9034
In section 209, who are the children of Lokai?
Kishori, Chhabin, Madan, and Raghunath.
9035
Vishwanath is recorded as the son of which figure?
Yaddu.
9036
Ratan is identified as the son of which person from the Baliyas 
Mool?
Kumar Singh.
9037
Shri Prakash is the son of which genealogical figure?
Chhakodi.
9038
Khatunath is identified as the son of which individual?
Shri Prakash.
9039
Vindhyanath is the son of which person from the Babhaniyam 
Mool?
Khatunath.
9040
Vishnupati and Jogo are recorded as the sons of whom?
Jayanand.
9041
List two of the sons of Vishnupati mentioned in section 209.
Lalbehari, Bhushan, Gangadatt, Kala, Diheshwar, or Tarapati.
9042
Mathuranath is identified as the son of which individual?
Lalbehari.
9043
Jainath is the son of which person from the Sodarpur origin?
Bhushan.
9044
Vidyanath is the son of which person from the Ekahara Mool?
Gangadatt.
9045
In section 210, who is the son of Prandhan?
Mukund.
9046
Buch is identified as the son of which individual?
Mukund.
9047
Dukhabhanjan is the son of which person from the Hariram origin?
Andi.
9048
Who were the sons of Manik Nandan mentioned in section 210?
Bhagwatnarayan, Bhaiyalal, and Gopal.
9049
Jagaddhar and Kumar are the sons of which person?
Bhagwatnarayan.
9050
Vrajmohan is the son of which genealogical figure?
Jagaddhar.
9051
In section 211, Shaktinath is recorded as the son of whom?
Gujar.
9052
Bauasaheb is identified as the son of which person?
Bhudar.
9053
Who were the children of Kala mentioned in the section 211 record? Chatrapati, Durlabh, and Bhikhia.
9054
Bhaiyalal and Amritnath are identified as the sons of whom?
Chatrapati.
9055
Madhav and Churman are recorded as the sons of which figure?
Babulal.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
9056
Shrilal and Ramlal are identified as the sons of which individual?
Bhikhia.
9057
In section 212, who are the sons of Harinandan from the Mahishi 
branch?
Nath and Mansukh.
9058
Dinanath and Lalo are identified as the sons of whom?
Nath.
9059
Who were the children of Dinanath mentioned in section 212?
Vishwanath, Shaktinath, and Muktinath.
9060
Lakshminath, Jhingur, and Madhav are the sons of which figure?
Shaktinath.
9061
Badrinath and Vijaynath are recorded as the sons of which 
individual?
Jhingur.
9062
In section 213, Kalikant and Digambar are the sons of whom?
Madhav.
9063
Raghunath and Revatinath are identified as the sons of which 
person?
Kalikant.
9064
List the four sons of Digambar mentioned in the Mahishi record.
Siddhinath, Shantinath, Satinath, and Chandinath.
9065
Chunchun and Bouno are recorded as the sons of which figure?
Muktinath.
9066
Punni is the son of which individual from the Khaual origin?
Chunchun.
9067
Artinath is identified as the son of which person?
Punni.
9068
In section 214, who is the son of Lal identified as 
Parameshwaridatt?
Lal.
9069
Krishmaman, Rudraman, and Karan are the children of which 
figure?
Lal.
9070
Bachhelal and Yaddu are recorded as the sons of whom?
Krishmaman.
9071
Shrikant and Markandey are identified as the sons of which 
individual?
Gulab.
9072
Harisharan is the son of which person from the Sodarpur origin?
Rudraman.
9073
Vedanand, Bechan, and Duara are identified as the children of 
whom?
Karu.
9074
In section 215, who is the son of Vedanand?
Indu.
9075
Chandradev and Baiku are identified as the sons of whom?
Mansukh.
9076
Diheshwar and Govind are recorded as the sons of which figure?
Baiku.
9077
Madhusudan and Yadunath are identified as the sons of which 
person?
Mannulal.
9078
In section 216, Lalit is the son of which person from the Mahishi 
branch?
Chandradev.
9079
Dhan is identified as the son of which genealogical figure?
Bhora.
9080
Who were the sons of Bhora mentioned in the section 216 record?
Bodhi, Bhukhia, Nenin, Sanand, and Bhawanidatt.
9081
Gopal and Madhukar are the sons of which individual?
Dhan.
9082
Banamali is identified as the son of which person?
Gopal.
9083
In section 217, Ram is identified as the son of which person?
Pemu.
9084
Jaldhar and Gangadhar are recorded as the sons of whom?
Juraun.
9085
Haridev is identified as the son of which individual?
Jaldhar.
9086
Shitaladatt is the son of which genealogical figure?
Sanand.
9087
Who were the children of Shitaladatt mentioned in section 217?
Raghubar, Nena, Ninu, and Devidatta.
9088
In section 218, who were the children of Bhawanidatt?
Amritnath, Gopinath, and Kartinnath.
9089
Ramkrishna and Kevalkrishna are recorded as the sons of whom?
Amritnath.
9090
Manohar and Govardhan are identified as the sons of which figure?
Chintaman.
9091
Chakradhar and Mahidhar are identified as the sons of which 
person?
Dukhan.
9092
Rajendra is recorded as the son of which genealogical figure?
Yogi.
9093
Siddhinath is the son of which person from the Darihara origin?
Kartinnath.
9094
Ugramohan and Premamohan are identified as the sons of which 
individual?
Rameshwar.
9095
In section 219, Durgadatt and Bhawanidatt are the sons of whom?
Mahi.
9096
Devnath and Ramanath are recorded as the sons of which figure?
Bhawanidatt.
9097
Jhotan and Sanphul are identified as the sons of which person?
Bhawanidatt.
9098
Nahibharan and Gopal are identified as the sons of which 
genealogical figure?
Devnath.
9099
In section 220, Manmohan, Aniruddha, and Lakshman are the sons 
of whom?
Gopal.
9100
Shukdev is recorded as the son of which individual?
Manmohan.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
9101
Tarakant and Yogakant are identified as the sons of which person?
Harikant.
9102
Dinesh and Raghunath are the sons of which genealogical figure?
Aniruddha.
9103
Vaidyanath is identified as the son of which person?
Nathuni.
9104
In section 221, Bhangi is recorded as the son of which person?
Ramanath.
9105
Tejnath, Ganesh, and Vishwanath are identified as the children of 
which figure?
Bacha.
9106
Bhudar is the son of which individual from the Darihara origin?
Tejnath.
9107
Ravinath and Gangadhar are identified as the sons of which person? Tejnath.
9108
Vijaynath, Upendra, and Mahendra are recorded as the children of 
which individual?
Ratinath.
9109
In section 222, Lakshminarayan is identified as the son of which 
person?
Kantir (Vishwanath).
9110
Ramashankar (Lalluk) is identified as the son of which genealogical 
figure?
Vishwanath.
9111
Shivkumar is the son of which individual as stated in the section 
222 record?
Suryaman.
9112
Vindhyanath is identified as the son of which person from the 
Sarisab Mool?
Ramashankar.
9113
Badrinath is recorded as the son of which figure in the Khandwala 
origin?
Parasman.
9114
Ishdatt is the son of which individual from the Pandua Mool?
Muni.
9115
Shatrughna is recorded as the son of which person?
Bhikh-khu.
9116
In section 223, Shrutidhar and Krishnadhar are identified as the 
sons of whom?
Kanhai.
9117
Chandradhar is recorded as the son of which genealogical figure?
Gangadhar.
9118
Tarakant and Saraswatikant are identified as the children of which 
person?
Ganesh.
9119
Mukund is identified as the son of which individual from the 
Baliyas Mool?
Mannu.
9120
Haladhar is recorded as the son of which figure?
Gumani.
9121
In section 224, Jivan and Hridaynath are recorded as the sons of 
whom?
Manbodh.
9122
Durlabh is identified as the son of which person from the Mander 
Mool?
Manbodh.
9123
Shivan and Manik are the sons of which genealogical figure?
Manbodh.
9124
Shobhanath and Shrinath are identified as the sons of which person? Manbodh.
9125
Dayanath and Kalanath are recorded as the sons of which 
individual?
Manbodh.
9126
Modnath and Lakshminath are identified as the sons of which 
person?
Manbodh.
9127
Ayodhyanath is the son of which person from the Baliyas origin?
Kulman.
9128
Mahadev and Vasudev are identified as the sons of which 
genealogical figure?
Ayodhyanath.
9129
In section 225, Babunandan is recorded as the son of which person? Chanda.
9130
Shiveshwar (Chichan) is identified as the son of which figure?
Phalgun.
9131
Vishweshwar, Jageshwar, and Hari are the children of which 
individual?
Manne.
9132
Govardhan and Gudar are identified as the sons of which person?
Nena.
9133
Ramanath (Khatru) is recorded as the son of which figure?
Lutan.
9134
Kamlu is identified as the son of which genealogical figure?
Gudar.
9135
Abhiram is the son of which individual from the Satlakha origin?
Kamlu.
9136
In section 227, Vanshmani and Grihamani are identified as the sons 
of whom?
Shivan.
9137
Brahmadatt and Dharmadatt are recorded as the sons of which 
person?
Shobhanath.
9138
Gopal and Jagmohan are identified as the sons of which figure?
Brahmadatt.
9139
Vrajmohan and Mahavir are recorded as the sons of which person?
Jagmohan.
9140
Rudramani is identified as the son of which individual?
Manik.
9141
Babunath and Gopinath are the sons of which genealogical figure?
Shrinath.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
9142
Anand is recorded as the son of which person from the Pali origin?
Bhanjan.
9143
Shyamnath is identified as the son of which person?
Bacha.
9144
Adinath and Premnath are identified as the sons of which 
genealogical figure?
Dayanath.
9145
Who were the children of Sanphul mentioned in section 228?
Hanumandatt, Bhagwandatt, Shankardatt, and Chandidatt.
9146
In the context of the Nagram records, what does the term 
'à¤¸à¥à¤¤à¥‹' (Suto) denote?
It identifies the individual as the son of the person previously 
named.
9147
In the context of Maithil genealogical records, what is the meaning 
of the term 'à¤¸à¥à¤¤à¤¾' (Suta)?
It identifies the individual as the daughter of the person previously 
named.
9148
In the Hati to Satlakha branch (230), who is identified as the son of 
Bhagirath?
Kalidash.
9149
Which individual is the son of Kalidash in the Hati branch 
according to section 230?
Nath.
9150
In section 230, the children of Nath are identified as Bacha, 
Chhitari, and _____.
Harikrishna
9151
According to the lineage records for Hati to Vilakhwar (231), who 
are the three sons of Yaduray?
Prayagdatta, Hanumandatta, and Bhagvandatta.
9152
Who is the son of Prayagdatta in the Hati to Vilakhwar branch?
Yashodhar.
9153
In section 231, identify the son of Hanumandatta.
Vighneshwar.
9154
Who is the father of Dharni Narayan in the Hati lineage records 
(231)?
Manhar.
9155
In section 232 (Hati to Vilakhwar), who are the two sons of 
Dukhbhanjan?
Dhan and Dullah.
9156
Identify the son of Dhan in the Hati to Vilakhwar branch records.
Kanhaiya.
9157
Who is the son of Dullah in the section titled 'Hati to Vilakhwar 
Chaniru'?
Umanath.
9158
In the lineage of Bandhuram (232), who is the son identified as 
Jhadrulaka?
Munimansukho.
9159
Who is the father of Keshavnarayan in the branch records of section 
232?
Rakani.
9160
Identify the son of Keshavnarayan in the lineage of Hati to 
Vilakhwar.
Mandhan.
9161
The son of Mandhan is identified as _____, who is linked to the 
Sakrarhi village.
Shyam
9162
According to section 232, who is the son of Shyam?
Hemnath (also known as Babujik).
9163
Who is the son of Hemnath in the Hati to Vilakhwar branch?
Harivansh.
9164
In the Hati to Saurath branch (233), which individual is associated 
as the son of Dhanga Bauye?
Fekan.
9165
In the Hati branch (233), who are the sons of Hridaynath (Hridi)?
Bodhik and Girdhari.
9166
Who is the father of Gharbharon Bandhavo in the Hati branch?
Girdhari.
9167
In section 233, identify the two sons of Bauye.
Shrikrishna and Jayakrishna.
9168
